row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight urban road with slight lane adjustments.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Static objects (buildings, parked cars) remain fixed; moving vehicles follow expected paths.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene on an overcast day with wet pavement. Multi-lane road with visible lane markings, sidewalks, buildings, trees, and parked/street vehicles.
semantic.visibility_notes: Raindrops on lens reduce clarity slightly but all key elements remain identifiable.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression; no sudden jumps or discontinuities in object positions or scene structure.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles maintain consistent presence and relative positions; no abrupt appearances/disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and roadside infrastructure remain stable and continuous across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle moves forward steadily within its lane, maintaining safe distance from adjacent traffic.
decision.risk_context: Wet road conditions may increase stopping distance, but no immediate hazards or emergency maneuvers are visible.

logical.object_continuity: Main objects persist across frames without disappearance, though their shapes occasionally warp or blur inconsistently.
logical.structure_continuity: Road and building structures remain generally coherent but show subtle warping or instability at boundaries.
